title: Click types: left vs right
goal: Restructure so left-click runs the give command and right-click shows `message = "Costs 10 emeralds"`.
hints: Drop the top-level `actions {...}` and put two siblings under `click`: `left { ... }` and `right { ... }`.
Each has its own `actions { ... }` with its own keys.

ru.title: Типы кликов: left vs right
ru.goal: Перестрой так чтобы left-click запускал команду give, а right-click показывал `message = "Costs 10 emeralds"`.
hints: Убери top-level `actions {...}` и положи два sibling'а под `click`: `left { ... }` и `right { ... }`.
У каждого свой `actions { ... }` со своими ключами.
